debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
A : Finset ι
m : ℕ
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace Ω
μ : Measure Ω
inst✝² : IsFiniteMeasure μ
mE : MeasurableSpace E
inst✝¹ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝ : InnerProductSpace ℝ E
X : ι → Ω → E
iIndepFun_X : iIndepFun X μ
integral_X : ∀ (i : ι), ∫ (ω : Ω), X i ω ∂μ = 0
memLp_X : ∀ i ∈ A, MemLp (X i) (2 * ↑m) μ
X₁ : ι → Ω × Ω → E := fun i => X i ∘ Prod.fst
X₂ : ι → Ω × Ω → E := fun i => X i ∘ Prod.snd
X' : ι → Ω × Ω → E := fun i => X₁ i - X₂ i
this : DecidableEq ι
⊢ ∫ (ω : Ω), ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ ≤ ∫ (ω : Ω × Ω), ‖∑ i ∈ A, X' i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ.prod μ

failed_attempts:
rw [MeasureTheory.integral_prod]
      · simp only [X', X₁, X₂, Function.comp_apply, Pi.sub_apply]
        calc
          ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ
          _ = ∫ ω₁, ∫ ω₂, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω₁‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ ∂μ := by
            simp only [MeasureTheory.integral_const, measure_univ, ENNReal.one_toReal, one_smul]
          _ ≤ ∫ ω₁, ∫ ω₂, ‖∑ i ∈ A, (X i ω₁ - X i ω₂)‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ ∂μ := by
            gcongr with ω₁
            have h_center : ∫ ω₂, ∑ i ∈ A, X i ω₂ ∂μ = 0 := by
              rw [integral_finset_sum]
              · simp [integral_X]
              · intro i hi
                exact (memLp_X i hi).integrable (by norm_cast; omega)
            have h_conv : ConvexOn ℝ Set.univ (fun x : E => ‖x‖ ^ (2 * m)) := by
              apply ConvexOn.pow
              · exact convexOn_univ_norm
              · exact Nat.zero_le _
            calc
              ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω₁‖ ^ (2 * m)
              _ = ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω₁ - ∫ ω₂, ∑ i ∈ A, X i ω₂ ∂μ‖ ^ (2 * m) := by rw [h_center, sub_zero]
              _ = ‖∫ ω₂, (∑ i ∈ A, X i ω₁ - ∑ i ∈ A, X i ω₂) ∂μ‖ ^ (2 * m) := by
                rw [integral_sub (integrable_const _)]
                · simp
                · exact Integrable.finset_sum _ fun i hi => (memLp_X i hi).integrable (by norm_cast; omega)
              _ ≤ ∫ ω₂, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω₁ - ∑ i ∈ A, X i ω₂‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ := by
                apply MeasureTheory.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const_of_convex h_conv
                sorry
              _ = ∫ ω₂, ‖∑ i ∈ A, (X i ω₁ - X i ω₂)‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ := by
                congr 1; ext ω₂; congr 1; rw [← Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
      · sorry
